title: RLR holding Christmas Craft Fair
description: ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - Looking for the perfect...
bodyText:
ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - Looking for the perfect gifts and festive treats? Join the RLR residents for a morning of Christmas shopping and holiday cheer at their popular annual Christmas Craft Fair this weekend.


> The fair is hosted by George Service Clubs on Saturday 6 December from 08:00 to 12:00 at RLR in De La Fontaine Street.


The fair is an annual highlight that brings together local crafters, residents, and visitors for a morning of Christmas shopping, handmade articles, and delicious treats.

The community's support is important to the residents and crafters who rely on this event to showcase their talents.

Shoppers can look forward to a wide variety of stalls offering beautiful jewellery, fun toys, nursery plants, and an assortment of Vintage Rose Boutique items. A spread of homemade foods will also be on sale, including cakes, jams, shortbread, small lemon meringues, small milk tarts, sausage rolls, quiches, fruit cakes, and more.

Visitors can also stop by the cosy Tea Room, where flapjacks with berry compote and cream will be served.


> With its warm community atmosphere and wide selection of gifts, the RLR Christmas Craft Fair is the perfect opportunity to find unique items while supporting local crafters.


For more information, contact Angelique Botha on 044 874 7494.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
